case_title: SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS vs. RIVERS, GERALDINE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS SERVED SEP-29-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, GERALDINE
